$meta.purpose: Define border-radius mappings, shadow details, and design rules

mappings.buttons: rounded-lg (10px), rounded-md (8px), or dynamic rounded-[min(var(--radius-md),12px)] / rounded-[min(var(--radius-md),10px)]

scale.shadow-sm: shadow-sm (used for support cards, buttons, dropdown selects)
scale.shadow-md: hover:shadow-md (used for support card hover highlight states)
scale.shadow-lg: shadow-lg (used for expanded user profile settings and submenus)

rules.name: Flat surfaces with clean borders
rules.rule: Avoid adding drop shadows on static layouts. Card panels and dividers must sit flat and rely on border-border 1px borders for structure.
rules.evidence: SeeWhatsNew, BrowseByTopic, and support center dashed boxes use flat bg-card/bg-transparent layout wrappers with border-border.

rules.name: Floating popup overlays
rules.rule: Only floating overlays (like profile submenus, dropdown options, and listboxes) should use shadow-lg or ring-1 ring-black/5 to indicate elevation over other elements.
rules.evidence: Observed on DropdownSelect options and Header user dropdown menus.

rules.name: Rounded hierarchy
rules.rule: Apply corner roundness hierarchically: small buttons and dropdowns use rounded-lg (10px), larger items like cards use rounded-xl (14px), and main section/dashboard wrappers use rounded-2xl (18px).
rules.evidence: Observed across components: Button uses rounded-lg, SupportGrid uses rounded-xl, BrowseByTopic and Welcome wrapper box use rounded-2xl.
